question.text: The contract trading cycle for monthly INR-based currency options is:

answer.text: 3 serial monthly contracts followed by 3 quarterly contracts (March/June/September/December cycle)

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Options have 3 serial monthly + 3 quarterly contracts. Additionally, weekly USDINR options have 11 serial weekly cycles. This is DIFFERENT from futures which have 12 serial monthly. **The Trap:** Futures have 12 monthly; Options have 3 monthly + 3 quarterly. Don't mix them up. **Cross-Exam Context:** Contract cycles differ between futures and options — tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The quarterly cycle (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec) provides longer-dated options for strategic hedging needs.
